profile.name: Elena Krayneva
profile.headline: Turning Marketing Data into Strategic Decisions
profile.subheadline: MSc Digital Marketing & Analytics student with hands-on experience in **data analysis**, **KPI reporting**, and **marketing strategy**. Combining structured analytical thinking with a strong business understanding to turn data into actionable insights.

experience.companyDescription: Digital division of X5 Group, Russia’s largest food retailer
bullets: Analyzed workforce datasets (headcount, onboarding, attrition, leave) and developed KPI reports to support workforce planning and organizational decision-making
Prepared recurring workforce KPI dashboard presentations summarizing key trends
Compiled workforce data and candidate profiles for talent reviews supporting succession planning across departments and two leadership levels (1–6 candidates per role)

experience.companyDescription: Russian audit & consulting firm, successor to PwC Russia
bullets: Developed structured Excel trackers to monitor contract approvals across departments, onboarding, payments, and renewals
Coordinated cross-functional approval workflows for 40+ contractors monthly
Proposed workflow improvements to streamline approval cycles and reduce administrative iterations

experience.companyDescription: Personnel outsourcing and workforce management platform
bullets: Coordinated workforce operations for a personnel base of approximately 3,000 employees
Managed shift allocation through internal systems to maintain operational continuity
Conducted high-volume recruitment and effectively resolved on-site workforce issues

experience.companyDescription: Global specialist in electrical and digital building infrastructures
bullets: Managed publication of job vacancies across internal and external platforms and coordinated initial candidate communication
Contributed to an external employer branding campaign through partnerships with universities and student outreach initiatives at both headquarters and regional offices
Supported recruitment pipeline tracking and prepared structured HR reports in Excel

experience.companyDescription: Health technology startup focusing on dermatological analytics
bullets: Structured and managed internal documentation workflows within a tech startup environment
Conducted analysis of external funding opportunities, including grants and financial support programs
Formalized technical documentation to improve internal information flow and process clarity
Collaborated directly with founders to ensure timely submission of applications and compliance requirements
